title: Tenet Dimension Report
description: Schema for a single Tenet dimension report written to .healthcheck/reports/{dimension}.json before orchestration.

key.description: Dimension identifier, e.g. security, build-ci, privacy-data

score.description: 0-100 integer score, null if not applicable

weight.description: Default weight for the dimension before dashboard overrides

skill_version.description: Version of the skill that produced this report

notes.description: One paragraph summary of what was examined and headline finding

applicable.description: Whether this dimension applies to the project

metrics.description: Dimension-specific key-value metrics. The testing dimension should preserve standardized mutation_* metrics here so the dashboard can render the Mutation Testing panel.

checks.description: Structured checklist entries shown in the dashboard's 'What was tested' section for this dimension.

name.description: Short label for the check or audit slice.

description.description: One-sentence explanation of what was examined.

details.description: Optional compact evidence, examples, or grouped results.

count.description: Optional count associated with this check, such as findings matched or files scanned.

tool.description: Optional deterministic tool name backing the check, e.g. semgrep, gitleaks, or syft.
